## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod catch-up to review content standards, AI tool updates, and address team concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company-wide content standards tightening: Matthew (Chief Content Officer) reviewing all content, establishing stricter guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Grid AI tool improvements: Better quality, following outlines more consistently (Persona 4 upgrade)](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Gemini AI effective for diversity articles: Uses webinars as knowledge bank, adapting tone and audience focus](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Topics

### Content Standard Updates

  - [Matthew (Chief Content Officer) reviewing all content across pods](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Stricter guidelines being implemented; less leeway for managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Current client satisfaction high, but need to stay ahead of potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [New process outlined in internal message for pain points, organization, and content focus](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Emphasis on structural adherence rather than word-level polish](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

### AI Tool Improvements

  - [Grid AI showing better performance in recent tests](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Upgraded to Persona 4, resulting in higher quality output](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Still some inconsistencies: followed outline in 2/3 test articles](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Kirk working on ensuring Grid sticks to outlines; other changes planned for next iteration](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Gemini AI excelling for diversity articles, leveraging webinar content effectively](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Workflow Adjustments

  - [Considering shift back to Grid AI for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Process for Gemini: Feed assignment brief, instruct to scan webinar transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Uploading webinar transcripts as files to Gemini for comprehensive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Team Communication

  - [Vivek shared detailed message in internal report channel about new content standards](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to read thoroughly and raise questions in thread or one-on-ones](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review Vivek's detailed message on content standards](https://fathom.video/share/y95pGGTf8PqAMsZEC8mdVwFV99sjQ-nS?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
